//db: DB connection string is built at startup from POSTGRES_HOST / POSTGRES_PORT / POSTGRES_DB / POSTGRES_USER / POSTGRES_PASSWORD environment variables. Source these from .env (gitignored) before launching the API — start.sh handles this automatically.
//videos: Bootstrap-only — used to seed a Default VideoSet on first startup; runtime VideoSets in the DB are authoritative thereafter. Override per-machine via .env (VideoStorage__Root and VideoStorage__ThumbnailsDirectory). Empty here so the tracked default reveals nothing about your filesystem.
//encode: Encode/Convert profile (issue #164). Backend 'ffmpeg' uses FfmpegArgs (a raw argument string inserted between -i <input> and the .mp4 output). Backend 'handbrake' uses HandBrakeCLI with HandBrakePresetFile + HandBrakePresetName (requires HandBrakeCLI on PATH). Override per-machine via .env (Encode__Backend, Encode__FfmpegArgs, etc.).
